title: Frank's Totally Awesome Mod
description: A small, dumb and fun mod for no reason.
body:
A small mod with a bunch of dumb and fun additions!
- This adds a gun which may or may not be dangerous to more than your opponent.
- A pearl which gives blindness to anyone unlucky enough to come in it's way.
- And finally a SUPER HOE, which tills a large area of land into farmland. 

**NOTE:**
This might be quite version dependent. The 1.20.1 build might work with 1.20 but I don't think it works for 1.20.2 and up, could be wrong though.
